| Event | Parameters |
|-------|------------|
| `PassportAnchored` | bytes32 indexed passportId, bytes32 contentHash, address indexed owner |
| `PassportStatusUpdated` | bytes32 indexed passportId, uint8 oldStatus, uint8 newStatus |
